productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Girls White Dial Analog Watch
description: Style Note Check out Q& Q's latest collection of watches for kids. Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Now let your little one flaunt her timely bling with panache.   Product Details Case style: Blue and pink plastic rectangular case Dial style: White and yellow dial with pink and blue hands and cartoon print on the dial Strap style: Pink plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset time Water resistant Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 20 mm  Case thickness: 7 mm
